name: Bantry Bespoke Joinery, Murnane & O'Shea
message: Murnane O'Shea Limited is one of Ireland's leading building contractors with over 60 years of experience, specializing in innovative and quality construction solutions for both residential and commercial projects. Bantry Bespoke Joinery specializes in bespoke joinery, blending traditional craftsmanship with modern manufacturing techniques.We will upload 11gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal information, detailed financials, contracts and agreements, confidential files, NDAs and so on.
